description_long: This is a compact, stylized airplane with a rounded fuselage and a smooth, streamlined shape. The body is primarily a muted reddish-brown color, with a green nose cone and underbelly, and a transparent dome-shaped cockpit canopy. The wings are short, thick, and slightly swept back, positioned at mid-fuselage, and the tail features a single vertical stabilizer with small horizontal stabilizers. The airplane is equipped with a single front-mounted propeller and fixed tricycle landing gear, with two main wheels and a smaller nose wheel. The overall design is cartoonish and simplified, with minimal surface detailing and a glossy, hard finish.
description: A compact, stylized airplane with a rounded reddish-brown body, green nose, dome cockpit, swept mid-wings, and fixed tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded nose, central propeller, wide mid-mounted wings, and the dome cockpit canopy.
description_view_1: Front-left perspective highlighting the thick, swept wings, fixed landing gear, and the transparent cockpit dome.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tapered fuselage, single vertical stabilizer, and the symmetrical wing placement.
description_view_3: Front-right perspective showing the propeller, landing gear, and the smooth transition from nose to tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with short, thick, slightly swept wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two small horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a transparent dome canopy.
